title: Haus Projekt 184 White Christmas Window Stickers, 5 A4 Sheets Xmas Snowflake Window Stickers Decorations 1.5cm to 9.5cm, Star Window Sticker Decoration, Festive Theme Clings, Reusable Winter Sticker
features: ❄️A WHITE CHRISTMAS: We can't promise you real snow, but hopefully with 184 individual snowflakes and stars you can still spread the Christmas joy. 1 pack contains 5 A4 sheets, in a variety of sizes from 1.5cm to 9.5cm. Decorate one window or decorate them all! There are so many options with so many snowflake window stickers, and if you change your mind, simply peel off and reapply.
✨NOT JUST FOR WINDOWS: Our Christmas window Stickers decals can stick to any smooth non-porous surface. Get excited to decorate everything from windows and mirrors to fridge doors and glass lanterns.

☃️OUR TOP TIP: To get the best possible seal and ensure your stickers stay in place all season, spray water onto the smooth surface first, and then slide the decal into place, taking time to push out all the air bubbles.

❄️REUSABLE: Static clings don't use any adhesive, and so can be used again! The thin vinyl works like a mini suction cup when pressed onto smooth surfaces, so removing the stickers is easy and mess free. Once peeled off it won’t leave behind any residue, and your sticker can be reused.

🌟A WINTER WONDERLAND: Christmas is all about creating magic, so our stickers and printed on both sides that way they'll look just as enchanting from the outside as they will inside. Each pack contains a variety of different sized snow flakes and stars so you can decorate your window exactly how you want, sold in a classic bright white colour to compliment all your decorations, every year.
